
```{ojs}

// highlights do not work!!
// TODO: highlights, haushaltstyp mit Kinder/ohne Kinder filtern, +/- 0 PP. in povertyChart


// Functions für HH-Einkommen und Armutsgefährdungsquote

function generateIncomeChart(group, highlight) {
  // Filter data based on the provided group and a variable that should be defined or passed in
  const filteredIncome = hhIncome.filter(d => d.group == group && d.variable == select); // Ensure 'select' is correctly defined or passed in
  
  const bars = vl
    .markBar({
      opacity: 0.8,
      fill: colors[1], // Make sure colors[1] is defined
    }) 
    .encode( 
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          grid: false,
          format: "+.2%",  // Format for y-axis labels as percentages
          labelFontSize: 10
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("detail")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          labelAlign: "right",
          labelPadding: 20,
          labelLimit: 200,  
          labelFontSize: 10,
        }),
//    vl.stroke(detail == highlight ? vl.value('black') : vl.value('transparent'))
  );

  
  const text = vl
    .markText({
      dy: -10,
      size: 10,
      align: "center",
    })
    .transform(
      vl.filter('datum.value !== 0'),
    )
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          format: "+.2f"
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("detail"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format("+.2~%"),
    );

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bars,
      text,    
    )
    .width(group == "Geschlecht" ? makeWidth(width) * 0.3 : group != "Haushaltstyp - detailiert" ? makeWidth(width) * 0.5 : makeWidth(width) * 0.6) // Dynamically set width based on group
    .data(filteredIncome)  // Use the filtered data
    .config(config); // Ensure 'config' is defined
}

function generateIncomeChartStatusquo(group) {
  // Filter data
  const filteredIncomeStatusquo = hhIncome.filter(d => d.group == group && d.variable == "Status quo");
  // // console.log(filteredIncomeStatusquo);

  const bars = vl
    .markBar({
      opacity: 0.8,
      fill: colors[2],
    }) 
    .encode( 
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          grid: false,
          labelFontSize: 10
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("detail")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          labelAlign: "right",
          labelPadding: 20,
          labelLimit: 100,  
          labelFontSize: 10,
        })
    );

 const text = vl
    .markText({
      dx: 10,
      size: 10,
      align: "right",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.y().fieldN("detail")
    )
    .transform(
      vl.calculate("format(datum.value, ',.0f') + '€'").as("formattedValue")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.text().fieldN("formattedValue")
    );

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bars,
      text,    
    )
    .width(makeWidth(width) * 0.3)
    .data(filteredIncomeStatusquo)  // Use the filtered data
    .config(config);
}


function generatePovertyChart(group) {
  const filteredPoverty = hhPoverty.filter(d => d.group == group && d.variable == select);
  // console.log(filteredPoverty);

  const bars = vl
    .markBar({
      fill: colors2[0],
      opacity: 0.8,
    }) 
    .encode( 
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          grid: false,
          format: "+.2f",
          labelFontSize: 10
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("detail")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          labelAlign: "right",
          labelPadding: 20,  
          labelLimit: 200,  
          labelFontSize: 10,
        }),
    )

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      dy: 10,
      size: 10,
      align: "center",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.y()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          format: "+.2f"  // Ensure format is set here for text
        }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldN("detail"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format(".2f")  // Format the text as fixed-point with one decimal
    )
    .transform(
      vl.filter('datum.value !== 0'),
      vl.calculate("datum.value >= 0 ? '+' + format(datum.value, '.2f') + ' PP.' : format(datum.value, '.2f') + ' PP.'")
        .as("formattedValue")
    )
    .encode(
      vl.text()
        .fieldN("formattedValue")  // Use the calculated field for text labels
    );

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bars,
      text,    
      )
    .width(group == "Geschlecht" ? makeWidth(width) * 0.3 : group != "Haushaltstyp - detailiert" ? makeWidth(width) * 0.5 : makeWidth(width) * 0.6)
    .data(filteredPoverty)  // Use the filtered data
    .config(config);
}


function generatePovertyChartStatusquo(group) {
  // Filter data
  const filteredPovertyStatusquo = hhPoverty.filter(d => d.group == group && d.variable == "Status quo");
  // console.log(filteredPovertyStatusquo);

  const bars = vl
    .markBar({
      opacity: 0.8,
      fill: colors2[1],
    }) 
    .encode( 
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          grid: false,
          format: ".0%",
          labelFontSize: 10
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("detail")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          ticks: false,
          labelAlign: "right",
          labelPadding: 20,
          labelLimit: 100,  
          labelFontSize: 10,
        })
    );

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      dx: 10,
      size: 10,
      align: "right",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .axis({
          format: ".2%"
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldN("detail"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format(".2%"),
    );

  return vl 
    .layer(
      bars,
      text,    
    )
    .width(makeWidth(width) * 0.3)
    .data(filteredPovertyStatusquo)  // Use the filtered data
    .config(config);
}
```
